title: Butter MC - BuMC
description: 1.20.1 / Reworks / Balance / Light / Vanilla+(+) / Don't play that play this!
body:
![Butter MC Banner. BuMC logo over a landscape of a modded biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b89d146b726dea5e8ab494505a4ed283668d0bbd_0.webp)

# FEATURES

✔️ Overhauled Progression ([End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem))

✔️ 100+ New Vanilla+ Biomes ([Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium))

✔️ Buttery Smooth! Utterly Beautiful! (Optimization + Shaders)

✔️ New Animals and Mobs! ([Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist), [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion), etc.)

✔️ 100+ New and Overhauled Structures! ([Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns), [Yung's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG))

✔️ The Otherside Dimension for Extra Post-Game Content! ([Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker))

✔️ QoL Features, Still Keeping It Vanilla+(+) ([Replanting Crops](https://modrinth.com/mod/replanting-crops), [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next), etc.)

✔️ [Antique Atlases](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4) to Make Exploring a Little Easier

✔️ Overhauled Features to be Made More Fair ([Economical Villager Trading](https://modrinth.com/mod/economical-villager-trading))
*you can disable this if you really wanna :(*

✔️ Made to be Just a Little More Challenging, Without Ruining the Fun! ([True Ending](https://modrinth.com/datapack/true-ending))

✔️ Light! (Around 100 mods)

❗Remember to allocate RAM if needed! (at least ~2-4gb recommended)

![Rawsushi logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b85133d42b929476a19e709a2ca9bf0525a97380.png)

### Yes, this is supposed to be a more "Vanilla" version of the [Better MC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-mc-fabric-bmc2) modpack (since it feels too modded), but go check that out too! The modpack's great in itself!

The full version is hosted on CurseForge. (not yet actually)

NOT AFFILIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT

_anyone from Luna Pixel Studios is free to request take down or changes if it's too similar to BMC_
